summary: Iter 22 — Confirmed media-delete regression (6/6) AND validated new TopVendors feature end-to-end: 11/11 backend tests + full frontend UI verification. All deterministic seed values match (vendor1=25/5 CTR20%, vendor2=12/2 CTR16.7%, vendor3=5/0 CTR0%). Tenant isolation, period filters, limit cap (50), auth-required all green. UI renders correctly above PushAnalytics with working pill filters.
critical_code_review_comments: Empty-state branch for 'yesterday' could not be exercised in QA org because there is 1 pre-existing historical page_view from yesterday for one of the vendors — code path is correct (TopVendors.js lines 102-108) but visually unverified. Not a blocker.

Backend response includes `organization_id` per item — tenant isolation test confirmed all items.organization_id == admin's org. Acceptable but consider stripping it from the public payload if not needed by UI (currently unused by TopVendors.js).

TopVendors.js silently hides on error (line 59 `if (error || !data) return null`) — fine for super-admin no-org case but masks transient backend errors from the admin. Consider a small toast on persistent error.
test_credentials: admin@example.com / admin123 (QA Test Org) — verified working
seed_data_creation: None created by tester. Used main agent's existing 49 synthetic events.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TopVendors feature fully validated: backend endpoint GET /api/analytics/top-vendors supports period (today|yesterday|7d|30d|month), limit (capped at 50), tenant-scoping by organization_id, returns sorted-desc items with vendor_id/vendor_name/profile_image_url/scans/whatsapp_clicks/ctr_pct. Frontend widget mounted in Overview.js between Performance per Venditore chart and PushAnalytics. data-testids: top-vendors-section, top-vendors-period-{today|yesterday|7d|30d|month}, top-vendors-list, top-vendors-empty, top-vendors-row-{vendor_id}. Main agent OK to deploy.
